text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week places first in her
exhibition race. I go to watch her
concert and find...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Spe. That was such an
intense race today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Suzuka! I'm so sorry, I'm just too
in my head right now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, because of your concert, huh? Then,
let me tell you something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka takes Special Week's
hands and whispers something into her
ear.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When you're standing on stage, try
looking at each of the audience
members' faces.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Each of them?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're up. Good luck out there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! There are so many people! All
looking at me...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The song's starting! I better hurry and
get on stage!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? My legs... won't move. Why?!
Come on, legs!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What do I do, Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Try looking at each and every one of the
 audience members' faces.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Each and every one of their faces...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Spe! You were incredible today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Spe, I love youuuu!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I can hear them.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They're all here for me. They're all
cheering me on.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so... happy. I have to do something. I
have to let them know how grateful I am.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I just need to be brave!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week jumps onstage and begins
to dance her heart out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her steps are a bit awkward at
times, they convey her wholehearted
passion.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Spe! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No, thank you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just at that moment, however, Special
Week stumbles on a step and trips!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That's our Spe, all right!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Spe! Please keep racing forever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's concert ends with
thunderous applause.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The audience looked thrilled. That was a
great performance.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I think I get it now, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Concerts are where I can express my
gratitude to my fans.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought I wanted to be Japan's top
racer for my mom...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But now I want to do it for all the fans
who cheer me on too!
